title: Stop thief!
question: 把今天课文里的“突然看到可疑事件 -> 记住线索 -> 不追赶 -> 告诉大人或报警”放进自己的安全场景。把下面 3 个空补完整，用 word bank 里的词或短语。
example_answer: I saw two people rush out of the shop. One of them was carrying a bag. They ran towards a green car. I did not chase them. I moved to a safe place and told an adult. The car was easy to recognize.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 描述看到的动作：两个人从商店冲出来
options.english_template: I saw two people ___ of the shop.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 描述可用线索：其中一个人提着包，并朝绿色汽车跑去
options.english_template: One of them was carrying a bag, and they ran towards a ___.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 选择安全行动：不追赶，去安全地点并告诉大人
options.english_template: I ___ them. I moved to a safe place and told an adult.
